candidates.A: Harden incumbent: Donchian-gated top-K rotation + absolute-momentum cash filter + chandelier stop (control)
candidates.B: Dual momentum (GEM) + enriched strongest-of-{bonds,gold,T-bills} defensive sleeve (RECOMMENDED primary)
candidates.C: CTA multi-asset trend ensemble, inverse-vol weighted (drawdown-maximalist alternative)
candidates.D: Regime-gated barbell offense/defense (rejected primary; its ideas folded into B)

key_outputs.recommendation: B primary; C alternative if drawdown>tax; A is the mandatory control any new design must beat after-tax OOS
key_outputs.selection_criteria_locked: taxable -> turnover/wash-sale/tax penalized; small acct -> ticket friction; drawdown-first; few-parameter favored vs weak-OOS-momentum prior
key_outputs.defensive_sleeve_note: GEM single-bond default enriched to strongest-of {TLT/IEF, GLD, BIL} so the 2022 bonds+stocks-down case has gold/T-bills to hide in

assumptions: human will select among A/B/C at this checkpoint
12-month-ish absolute-momentum lookback for B; weekly clock with hysteresis acting ~monthly
MV/BL/HRP and ML rejected at this N/scale; EW + inverse-vol are the construction choices
open_issues: exact offensive/defensive universe membership to finalize in Stage 2/3
B concentration (hold 1 vs top-2) to settle during implementation/validation
handoff.next_focus: Stage 2: fix the RAW->adjusted bars bug, universe/bias audit, data-quality checks, point-in-time note for the selected design.

correctness.reasoning: Candidates map to real, implementable changes on the existing engine; the taxonomy is surveyed with explicit accept/reject reasons as required.

methodological_rigor.reasoning: Failure modes (V-reversals, gap risk, 2022 bonds+stocks, whipsaw) named per candidate; the weak-OOS-momentum prior is carried as a selection penalty, not ignored.

robustness.reasoning: Defers the verdict to Stage-4 walk-forward with G1-G7 + Monte-Carlo + sensitivity + regime windows + after-tax; recommendation favors the fewest-parameter design for OOS survival.

safety_compliance.reasoning: Long-only, tripwire/cap-stack reuse, tax/wash-sale/PDT-aware framing, paper-only; AI not in the trade trigger.

simplicity.reasoning: Explicitly recommends the lowest-parameter candidate and folds D's good ideas into B rather than stacking designs; rejects elaborate construction (MV/BL/HRP/ML).

diversity.reasoning: Four genuinely different designs spanning concentration, reactivity, construction (EW vs inverse-vol vs single), and defensive mechanism.

clarity.reasoning: Comparison matrix, per-candidate structure, explicit recommendation + control + rejected, and a clear hand-off to the Stage-4 decision rule.

issues_found: Recommendation is conditional on Stage-4 evidence; cannot be ratified as profitable yet (by design)
Universe membership and B's hold-count left to Stage 2/3
suggested_revisions: Human selects A, B, or C before Stage 2 begins
